title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: A tutorial on building AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, grounded in enterprise data. The video covers the Model Context Protocol (MCP), MCP Toolbox for Databases, configuration via tools.yaml, and steps to set up a functional agent that translates prompts into data requests through a web interface.
